name: reduction_xor_feedback
description: Code should include a unary reduction XOR operator where the result is assigned back to the same variable used as input, creating a feedback loop through a reduction operation.

name: case_default_only
description: Code should include a case statement with only a default case item and no explicit case labels, which creates implicit case matching behavior.
snippet:
case (0)
    default: begin
        b = c;
    end
endcase

name: vector_range_high_low
description: Code should include a vector declaration with a non-standard range where the high index is greater than the low index, using reversed or non-contiguous indexing.
